overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in red armor exploring a dimly lit industrial spaceship or station interior. The character moves through narrow red-lit corridors into a medical bay and then transitions into a warmer-lit office area. The environment features sci-fi industrial design with metal walls, chain barriers, and emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with chain-link walls

agents.ego_description: character in red armor walking steadily down a narrow corridor with red emergency lighting

entered.detail: metal chain-link barrier running along the right wall with heavy industrial chains
large industrial metal doorway at the end of the corridor
riveted metal wall panels with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. Heavy chain-link barriers line the right wall while riveted metal panels cover the left. The environment suggests the interior of a spaceship or industrial station.

scene_state.functional_zone: small medical quarters with cot and storage

events.description: character enters a small room containing a medical cot and shelving units

agents.ego_description: character walks into a compact medical room, passing a metal bed and storage shelves

entered.detail: metal-framed bed with white sheets and pillow against the right wall
tall industrial shelving unit with multiple levels for storage
rolling cart with medical supplies and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small medical quarters from the narrow corridor. The room contains a metal-framed medical cot against the right wall, tall shelving units, and a medical equipment cart. The red emergency lighting continues to illuminate the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: office quarters with desk and computer equipment

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from red emergency to warmer yellow-white artificial light
character moves from medical bay into furnished office area with desks and chairs

agents.ego_description: character continues forward into an office space, passing a wooden desk and computer equipment

entered.detail: wooden-topped office desk with items scattered on the surface
swivel office chair positioned in front of the desk
tall white filing cabinet with multiple drawers
illuminated screen mounted on the wall displaying green text

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into an office area where the lighting shifts from red to warmer yellow tones. The space contains an office desk with a swivel chair, a filing cabinet, and a wall-mounted monitor. The medical cot from the previous room is visible in the far background before disappearing from view as the character moves deeper into the office quarters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial interior that transitions from a red-hued emergency zone into a warmer office environment. It begins by following a character in red armor through a narrow corridor lined with riveted metal panels and heavy chain-link barriers under oppressive red lighting. As the character moves forward, the corridor opens into a small medical quarters containing a metal-framed cot, shelving units, and an equipment cart, all still bathed in the same red glow. The scene then shifts as the character enters an adjacent office area, where the lighting transforms from red to warm yellow tones. This final space expands to reveal a desk with a swivel chair and a filing cabinet, while the medical cot recedes into the background and disappears from view.
